# N17043 HGB Medium-Wall Guard Grid

Analysis-only feature guard scan. It uses the N17043 synthetic/node target and does not use original BUT for selection.

## Takeaway

- Best pure acc guard: acc `0.943001`, good/medium/bad `0.966849/0.882857/1.000000`, errors `1810`.
- Best point satisfying recall floors good>=0.92, medium>=0.90, bad>=0.90: acc `0.940104`, good/medium/bad `0.950126/0.901016/1.000000`, errors `1902`.
- No scanned guard reaches acc>=0.95, but the recall-floor point proves the full-good 17,043 target is mostly learnable with a broad medium wall.
- Remaining gap to 0.95 is roughly 200-300 rows, not a missing class.
